audit_scope: All 8 lexical fields, 22 minigame scripts, dispatch chain, scoring, MOS integration

checks.name: FIELD_MINIGAMES constants vs registry GAMES naming consistency
checks.detail: merlin_constants.gd:329 FIELD_MINIGAMES uses old logical names (herboristerie, fouille, runes, ombres, equilibre, negociation, traces). minigame_registry.gd GAMES uses script IDs (mg_pile_ou_face, mg_oeil_corbeau, etc.). pick_minigame_for_field() in effect_engine:760 and select_minigame() in card_system:228 return old names that are NOT valid field names or GAMES keys. Result: these functions fall back to 'apaisement' or generic path.

checks.name: 8 lexical fields all have GAMES entries in registry
checks.detail: chance(2), bluff(3), observation(3), logique(3), finesse(3), vigueur(2), esprit(3), perception(3) = 22 minigames across 8 fields. Bible target 15+ exceeded.

checks.name: SUCCESS_THRESHOLD = 80 matches bible
checks.detail: merlin_minigame_system.gd:19 SUCCESS_THRESHOLD=80. MULTIPLIER_TABLE reussite starts at 80. Consistent.

checks.name: Minigame is mandatory (no skip path)
checks.detail: game_controller_minigame.gd always calls run_minigame(). Timeout fallback score=50 is used but minigame is never skipped.

checks.name: Timeout fallback score 50 effect on gameplay
checks.detail: game_controller_minigame.gd:88 returns score=50 on 30s timeout. MULTIPLIER_TABLE: 50 is in range 21-50 → factor=-1.0 → FULL NEGATIVE EFFECTS. A network/rendering timeout applies the same penalty as a deliberate failure. Bible says minigame is mandatory but doesn't mandate timeout = punishment. Recommend: timeout score=51 (reussite_partielle, factor=0.5) as neutral outcome.

checks.name: Difficulty scaling per bible s.6.3
checks.detail: game_controller_minigame.gd:47 always uses base_diff=5. Bible says difficulty depends on narrative context (card type, event type, biome maturity). Only is_critical adds +3. All non-critical cards have identical difficulty regardless of biome depth or MOS progression. Breaks progression difficulty curve.

checks.name: neutre field handling
checks.detail: merlin_constants.gd:338 FIELD_MINIGAMES has 'neutre':[apaisement,volonte]. But registry.create_minigame('neutre') → field not in GAMES → falls back to 'chance'. If merlin_card_system returns 'neutre' field, the wrong minigame type is played.

checks.name: All 22 minigame scripts exist
checks.detail: All scripts in GAMES dict exist as .gd files. mg_meditation.gd correctly deleted (director q-20260413-004 applied).

checks.name: MiniGameBase SFX integration
checks.detail: minigame_base.gd:84-89 calls SFXManager.play(minigame_success/fail). game_controller_minigame.gd:100 also calls minigame_success. Double-trigger risk: both base and controller play success SFX on win. Should deduplicate.

checks.name: Ogham bonus integration
checks.detail: MiniGameRegistry.get_ogham_bonus() returns +10 for field match, +5 for special. Passed via modifiers.score_bonus. Applied in MiniGameBase._complete():78. Chain is correct.

checks.name: Multiplier table coverage 0-100
checks.detail: MULTIPLIER_TABLE covers 0-20, 21-50, 51-79, 80-94, 95-100 = full 0-100 range. No gap. resolve_card uses score to select multiplier correctly.
